palette_hint: warm off-white background (#faf7f2), dark charcoal text (#1c1a17), deep teal accent (#1a6b5a) and amber highlight (#d4860a)
type_style: Georgia serif for headings, system sans-serif for body and UI, bold weights for prices and labels, slightly condensed feel
description: An online specialty shop selling letterpress printing supplies, inks, and custom type blocks under the brand Inkwell Press Co.
constraints: sticky top nav bar (~64px tall) with logo left, category links center, cart icon + item count badge on right
catalog page uses a fixed left filter sidebar (220px) listing categories, ink colors as swatches, and price range; right area scrolls independently with a 3-column product grid
product cards always show a solid colored square placeholder (color varies per product), product name, a short 6-word descriptor, and price — no image tags
cart page splits into a left scrollable line-item list (65% width) and a sticky right order-summary panel (35% width) that stays fixed while items scroll
orders page uses a dense data table with alternating row shading, columns for Order #, Date, Items, Status badge (colored pill), and Total

page_specs.home: Full-width hero block in deep teal with large serif headline 'Every impression counts.' and a sub-line about handcrafted letterpress supplies, plus a centered amber CTA button. Below the hero, a 4-column featured-products strip shows four product cards. A narrow full-width banner beneath advertises free shipping over $75, followed by a 3-column editorial row with bold category tiles labeled Inks, Type Blocks, and Paper Stock.
page_specs.catalog: Two-column layout: fixed 220px left sidebar with a filter panel containing checkboxes for Category (Inks, Rollers, Type, Paper, Tools), a row of 8 small color swatches for ink families, and a min/max price input pair. The right scrollable area shows a 3-column CSS grid of 9 product cards with a sort dropdown and result count line above the grid.
page_specs.product: Two-column layout: left column (55%) holds a large 480px square solid-color placeholder block with the product's ink color, plus two smaller 120px thumbnail squares below it. Right column (45%) shows product name in large serif, SKU in muted small text, star rating row using text characters, price in bold amber, a paragraph of product description, a quantity stepper input, an 'Add to Cart' button in teal, and a collapsible details section listing Weight, Coverage, and Drying Time in a small definition table.
page_specs.cart: Two-column layout: left area (65%) lists 4 cart line items each as a horizontal row with a 72px color-square placeholder, product name and variant, a quantity stepper, unit price, and a remove link. A subtotal line sits below the list. Right area (35%) is a sticky order-summary card showing Subtotal, Shipping estimate, Promo code input field, and Order Total in large bold type, with a full-width 'Proceed to Checkout' button in teal and accepted payment icons as text labels (Visa, MC, PayPal).
page_specs.orders: Two-column layout: narrow left sidebar (200px) with account navigation links — Overview, Orders, Addresses, Saved Items, Sign Out — with the Orders link highlighted in teal. Right main area shows a heading 'Your Orders' and a dense HTML table of 7 orders with alternating row backgrounds (#faf7f2 and #f0ebe2), columns for Order #, Date, Items (count), Status (colored pill: green for Delivered, amber for Processing, red for Cancelled), and Total. Above the table a small filter bar allows filtering by status via radio buttons.
